title: Section 28M
content: 1[28M. Procedure for Authority 2***.--(1) The Authority shall follow such procedure as may be prescribed. 3****
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 72, ibid., for section 28M (w.e.f. 28-3-2018). 2. The words “and Appellate Authority” omitted by Act 33 of 2021, s. 12 (w.e.f. 4-4-2021). 3. Sub-section (2) omitted by s. 12, ibid. (w.e.f. 4-4-2021).
